view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for check-in/check-out times is satisfied as per the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for check-in/check-out times is satisfied as per the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for check-in/check-out times by referencing the linked use case, which explicitly states the check-in time as 4 PM and check-out time as 11 AM. Additionally, the system's enforcement of a 5-hour gap between bookings further confirms that the requirement is met. The evidence from the linked use case and the successful prior steps supports the conclusion that the requirement is adequately covered.
